description:
Andrej Karpathy joined Anthropic — co-founder of OpenAI, former AI lead at Tesla. He reports to Nick Joseph (also ex-OpenAI), building a new team inside pre-training to use Claude to accelerate the next Claude. Anthropic's $30B run rate tripled in 4 months. Valuation talks now reach $900B. CNBC just named Anthropic the #1 Disruptor of 2026.

----
🚀 DYNAMOUS AI COMMUNITY

⚡ HOSTINGER — RELIABLE HOSTING FOR YOUR PROJECTS (10% OFF)

(Affiliate link — costs you nothing, supports the channel.)
----

What you will see in this 2-minute breakdown:
- The X-post that hit 26.3M views in three days
- Where Karpathy lands — pre-training under Nick Joseph (also ex-OpenAI)
- The brief: build a new team that uses Claude to accelerate the next Claude
- Constitutional AI (Anthropic) vs Compute + Volume (OpenAI)
- $30B annualized run rate in April, triple in four months
- Dario Amodei's reaction: "Just crazy. Too hard to handle."
- Series F at $183B → talks now reach $900B
- CNBC Disruptor 50 — Anthropic ranked #1 for 2026
- Why the model is no longer the moat — and the wrapper is
- Community reactions from @leonardtang_, @kylejeong, @justinsunyt, @jkeatn, @thoughtlesslabs, @ruslanjabari

Karpathy on X: https://x.com/karpathy/status/1924558840906387815
CNBC announcement: https://www.cnbc.com/2026/05/19/anthropic-hires-openai-cofounder-andrej-karpathy-former-tesla-ai-lead.html
TechCrunch coverage: https://techcrunch.com/2026/05/19/openai-co-founder-andrej-karpathy-joins-anthropics-pre-training-team/
Axios brief: https://www.axios.com/2026/05/19/anthropic-openai-karpathy-andrej-claude
CNBC Disruptor 50 (Anthropic #1): https://www.cnbc.com/2026/05/19/2026-cnbc-disruptor-50-rankings-anthropic-no-1.html
$1T valuation breakdown: https://www.the-ai-corner.com/p/anthropic-1-trillion-valuation-dario-amodei-2026-breakdown

Constitutional AI and the wrapper — or pure compute and the bigger model. Which strategy wins by 2027? Drop your pick below.
